begining_of_contract.text: วันที่เริ่มสัญญา

loan_type.text: ประเภทเงินกู้

document_group.text: กลุ่มเอกสาร

document_status.text: จัดกลุ่มเอกสาร

combo.document_status_name: 2=ไม่จัดกลุ่ม/1=จัดกลุ่มแล้ว

root.sql: select sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type as loan_type , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description AS loan_type_description , sum(sc_lon_m_contract.real_recieve) as real_recieve , count(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no) as loan_contract_no , sum(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_approve_amount) as loan_approve_amount , sum(sc_lon_m_loan_request.buy_share) as buy_share , sum(sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_old_loan) as total_old_loan , sum(sc_lon_m_loan_request.total_oldint) as total_oldint , count(sc_lon_m_contract.membership_no) as membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract,'sd month yyyy') as begining_contract_th , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , NVL(sum(sc_com_m_receipt.total_interest),0) as total_int , sc_lon_m_loan_request.document_status , sc_lon_m_loan_request.document_group , '!user_print!' as user_print , '!seq_doc!' as seq_doc from sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_lon_m_rule --, sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_com_m_receipt --, si_security_user where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_com_m_receipt.receipt_no(+) = sc_lon_m_contract.receipt_no --and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type --and si_security_user.user_id = sc_lon_m_contract.paid_loan_id and sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status = '1' --and sc_lon_m_contract.create_loan_status = '2' and sc_lon_m_rule.invest_status = '0' /*WHERE*/ group by sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type , sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type_description , sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract , sc_lon_m_loan_request.document_status , sc_lon_m_loan_request.document_group

r_port_loan_paid_nest.sql: select sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_name as fee_name , sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type , sum(sc_lon_m_req_fee.amount) as fee_amount , sc_lon_m_loan_request.document_group , sc_lon_m_loan_request.document_status , sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract from sc_lon_m_req_fee , sc_lon_m_ucf_fee , sc_lon_m_loan_request , sc_lon_m_contract where sc_lon_m_contract.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_type = sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type and sc_lon_m_contract.rec_rep_status = '1' and sc_lon_m_loan_request.loan_requestment_no = sc_lon_m_req_fee.loan_requestment_no and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract = {0} and sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type = {1} and sc_lon_m_loan_request.document_group = {2} and sc_lon_m_loan_request.document_status= {3} /*WHERE*/ --and sc_lon_m_contract.begining_of_contract = '16 พ.ค. 2024' --and trim(sc_lon_m_contract.loan_type) = 12 --and sc_lon_m_loan_request.document_group = '3' group by sc_lon_m_ucf_fee.fee_name , sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type , sc_lon_m_loan_request.document_group , sc_lon_m_loan_request.document_status , sc_lon_m_loan_request.requestment_date , sc_lon_m_loan_request.begining_of_contract order by sc_lon_m_req_fee.fee_type
